_comment: ADR-019 relative session scoring. Band evaluation: priority descending, first band whose predicates ALL pass; exactly one fallback. minEfficiency/minBucketEfficiency are authored as fractions in [0,1] (loadData converts to integer percentage points: userTotal/ceilingTotal from computeSessionCeiling). W3 retune (sim n=500 seed=42 greedy+random): greedy total-eff compressed 96-100 (p50 99), so per-bucket efficiency (MID/ATT cascade 99->98->97->none) is the primary discriminator within the eff=98-99 majority. 10-0 requires near-perfect MID+ATT (99) AND WL>=86 — efficiency alone cannot let a star-XI-with-one-62 through. 7-1 shares WL>=86 with 10-0 but drops per-bucket (great total, strong floor, imperfect somewhere). 1-2 drops requireAllBucketsNonEmpty to catch structurally-broken-but-decent-eff drafts (empty GK, strong outfield). Six-gate protocol: greedy 10-0 6%, no band >40%, random top-3 0%, all bands >=1%, near-miss-10-0 11%, WL floor has teeth.

formations.description: Balanced classic — four defenders, three midfielders, three forwards
Traditional English — two strikers, flat four midfield
Attack-minded — three at the back, packed midfield
Defensive solidity — five defenders, counter-attacking outlets
